implementationSummary: Issue #424: wired Analytics API poll targets (A-31–A-39 + A-25) into Fujiwa production-read polling. Added AnalyticsResource with start_date_ge/end_date_lt + pagination, production-read GET allowlist paths, sync_analytics worker + orchestrate hook (shared with ADR-021 manual refresh), and tiktok_sync_state endpoint keys. LIVE A-26–A-29 and Analytics ETL left unwired.
assumptions: Manual refresh poll hook is covered by maybe_poll_tiktok_data → run_fujiwa_poll_cycle (no separate analytics entrypoint)
A-25 Get Activity runs only when sync_state.promotion_activity_ids is populated (webhook/create flows)
Analytics ETL handoff deferred to downstream child — sync updates watermarks only
One-day UTC date window (yesterday → today exclusive) is the default poll window
risks: Detail fetches (A-31/A-33) for large list pages may exhaust the 10/min RateLimiter bucket mid-cycle
promotion_activity_ids is in-memory-only until a persistence path exists for activity id catalogs
